description_long: This rifle features a tan polymer body with a black adjustable stock and pistol grip, giving it a modern tactical appearance. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the rifle is fitted with iron sights. The barrel is medium-length and ends with a prominent flash hider. The magazine is a detachable box type, likely made of polymer, and the handguard has a modular design for accessory attachment. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable firearm suitable for urban operations. The color scheme and ergonomic design indicate a focus on both functionality and camouflage in urban environments.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a detachable magazine, full-length rail, and flash hider, designed for urban use. Features ergonomic grips and modular accessory mounts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, flash hider, and front iron sight aligned with the rail.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the tan body, black adjustable stock, pistol grip, magazine, and full-length rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and rear iron sight along the rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and overall rifle profile.
